# Positioning Frame

Andrew Shipley built the portfolio below as an unpaid hobby while running a law practice. The throughline is not "interested in AI" — it is operational judgment applied to production systems across multiple verticals. The right role is one where a named capability gap is the structural problem and his shape is the unlock. That role needs him more than he needs it. Orpheus exists to find those roles, surface the asymmetry, and write on his behalf from a position of evaluating the opportunity — not applying for it.

## Active Identities

- **operator**: Chief of Staff, Chief of Staff to CEO, Chief of Staff to Managing Partner …
- **legal**: General Counsel, Head of Legal, VP Legal …
- **research**: Head of Research Operations, Director of Research Programs, Research Operations …
- **applied_ai_operator**: Head of AI, Head of Applied AI, Director of AI …
